items.project_definition: The specific accessibility conformance level required for the user interface to ensure a minimal standard of inclusive design.

items.contextual_anchor: User Story 1 - Add an Expense (Priority: P1)
items.project_definition: The set of behavioral conditions that must be satisfied to verify the completion of a functional unit.
A restricted set of labels used to classify spending, such as Food or Transport.
A financial record consisting of a value, timestamp, classification, and optional notes.
The unique alphanumeric identifiers for mandatory system behaviors.
The isolated development stream used for implementing the initial tracker version.
The restriction limiting monetary values to a maximum of 999,999.99 with two decimal precision.
The international standard format utilized for recording the date strings of entries.

items.contextual_anchor: User Story 1 - Add an Expense (Priority: P1)
items.project_definition: A verification method that validates a specific feature without relying on other system components.
The raw user description providing the initial functional goals for the application.
The browser-based synchronous key-value storage mechanism used for data persistence.
The logical negation operator used to explicitly define out-of-scope capabilities, such as editing.
The unique alphanumeric identifiers for quantifiable performance and quality targets.

items.contextual_anchor: User Story 1 - Add an Expense (Priority: P1)
items.project_definition: A high-level description of a feature from the perspective of the end-user.
The fixed currency unit utilized for all monetary calculations and displays.
The global accessibility guidelines used to evaluate the dashboard's inclusivity.
